summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Local Jewel analytics dashboard with 12-tab intelligence suite. All backend APIs functional, frontend UI working correctly, and existing wizard flow preserved.

flaky_endpoints.issue: OTP response format validation too strict in test

design_issues.issue: Refresh button not easily identifiable via standard selectors

passed_tests: Admin login with credentials ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709
Analytics dashboard loads with 12 tabs (Overview, Funnel, Friction, Lead Quality, Attribution, Geo, Devices, Visitors, Trends, Events, Lead Ops, Insights)
All 12 tabs are clickable and functional
Date preset filter buttons (Today, 7d, 30d, 90d, All) work correctly
Overview tab shows KPI metric cards (Sessions, Wizard Starts, Leads Created, Completion Rate) with period deltas
Funnel tab displays funnel events data
Events Health tab shows event monitoring
Lead Ops tab displays aging buckets and priority queue
Insights tab shows smart insights interface
Backend API /api/admin/analytics/executive returns valid JSON with metrics and deltas
Backend API /api/admin/analytics/events-health returns event health statuses
Backend API /api/events accepts enhanced payload with viewport, page_url, step_time_ms
Frontend analytics.js fires tlj_session_start on page load
Existing wizard flow works (navigate to landing page, click Get My Free Quote, wizard loads and progresses)
All analytics endpoints (trends, friction, quality, sources, geo, devices, visitors) functional

success_percentage.backend: 96% (24/25 tests passed - only OTP test format issue)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (analytics dashboard fully integrated with backend APIs)
